testcase.name: test_create_distribution
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_distributions_router.py:157: in test_create_distribution assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","purpose_classification"],"msg":"Input should be 'distribution', 'compensation', 'expense' or 'other'","input":"discretionary","ctx":{"expected":"'distribution', 'compensation', 'expense' or 'other'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_benevolence_distribution
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_distributions_router.py:187: in test_create_benevolence_distribution assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","purpose_classification"],"msg":"Input should be 'distribution', 'compensation', 'expense' or 'other'","input":"benevolent","ctx":{"expected":"'distribution', 'compensation', 'expense' or 'other'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_benevolence_missing_recipient_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_distributions_router.py:209: in test_create_benevolence_missing_recipient_fails assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","purpose_classification"],"msg":"Input should be 'distribution', 'compensation', 'expense' or 'other'","input":"benevolent","ctx":{"expected":"'distribution', 'compensation', 'expense' or 'other'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
